slices.alt_text: PRACTICALLYPERFECT INEVERYWAY. IT’S SORT OF OUR M I S SI ON STAT EMEN T. You’re trying to pick the perfect club community. Let us help narrow your search. WindRiver in the rolling hills of eastern Tennessee is, dare we say, perfect. This is more than a club, it’s a lifestyle, inherently active, surrounded by miles of adventure from the trails to the courts to the course to Tellico Lake. DISCOVER PERFECT

paragraphs.text: You’re trying to pick the perfect club community. Let us help narrow your search. WindRiver in the rolling hills of eastern Tennessee is, dare we say, perfect. This is more than a club, it’s a lifestyle, inherently active, surrounded by miles of adventure from the trails to the courts to the course to Tellico Lake.

slices.alt_text: IT’S ALL RIGHT HERE. Eighteen perfectly manicured holes of our championship golf course, a 216-slip marina, sports courts, spa, and a new clubhouse, and you’ll want to make this wonderland perfectly yours. Manicured and private, with an enthusiastic membership and featuring exceptional residences — maybe perfection at last.

paragraphs.text: Eighteen perfectly manicured holes of our championship golf course, a 216-slip marina, sports courts, spa, and a new clubhouse, and you’ll want to make this wonderland perfectly yours. Manicured and private, with an enthusiastic membership and featuring exceptional residences — maybe perfection at last.

slices.alt_text: S EE I NG IS BELI EVI NG. JOINUS FOR A DISCOVERY TOUR. The only way to take in all that is WindRiver is to visit. Our Discovery Tour includes dinner, accommodations at our cozy Lakeside Inn or a nearby hotel, VIP access to community amenities, and a round for two on our spectacular golf course. Let’s plan your stay! LEARN MORE

paragraphs.text: The only way to take in all that is WindRiver is to visit. Our Discovery Tour includes dinner, accommodations at our cozy Lakeside Inn or a nearby hotel, VIP access to community amenities, and a round for two on our spectacular golf course.

slices.alt_text: BU I LT TO PERFECTION 1 7 0 1 2  L I G H T H O U S E  P O I N T E  D R I V E Perfectly sited along scenic Tellico Lake’s main channel, this home offers sweeping water views and superior craftsmanship throughout. Soaring ceilings, exposed beams, and a rustic stone fireplace create a warm, inviting atmosphere in the living room — ideal for relaxing or entertaining. The gourmet kitchen features sleek glass appliances and expansive custom cabinetry. Includes a safe room, whimsical custom-built bunk room (sleeps six), game room, kitchenette, and bar. STEP INSIDE

Perfectly sited along scenic Tellico Lake’s main channel, this home offers sweeping water views and superior craftsmanship throughout.
